title: ‘I thought it was spam’: Indian expat wins Dh20 million in Abu Dhabi Big Ticket draw
summary_full: An Indian expatriate in Oman, Shanthanu Shettigar, has won the Dh20 million grand prize in Abu Dhabi's Big Ticket draw. He purchased the winning ticket with a friend, and the duo will share the life-changing jackpot. The draw also awarded five other winners with Dh1 million each.
